title: Jai'galaar (clone)
content:
{{Top|canon=Jag}} {{Youmay|the [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone trooper pilot]]|the starship ''[[Jai'galaar]]''; the [[Shriek-hawk/Legends|Shriek-hawk]], called Jai'galaar in [[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]]; or [[Jag (disambiguation)|other uses of the name Jag]]}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Jag.jpg]] |name=Jai'galaar
CT-55/11-9009 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] ([[Cloning/Legends|clone]]){{Film|III}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} establishes that all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] in [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] were [[Gender/Legends|male]]. |pronouns=He/him{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Tan |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[127th Gunship Wing]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|It will be done, my lord.|Jag to Palpatine|audio=Jag-ItwillbedoneMyLord.flac|}} '''Jai'galaar''', also known simply as '''Jag''' and designated '''CT-55/11-9009''', was a [[Clone Captain/Legends|clone trooper captain]] who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. A [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone pilot]] who took the [[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]] name Jai'galaar, Jag originally served as a [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] at the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], but was demoted to [[Captain/Legends|captain]] after the [[Retreat at Katraasii]]. However, [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] drafted the captain as a test [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the new [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170 starfighters]]. During the [[Battle of Cato Neimoidia/Legends|battle]] over [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]], Jag served as a wingman to Koon and [[Death/Legends|executed]] the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] after [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was issued by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. ==Biography== [[File:JagOrder66.png|thumb|left|250px|Jag's [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170 starfighter]] during the execution of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]].]] CT-55/11-9009, who adopted the name Jai'galaar or simply Jag, was one of the many [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. At the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], then-[[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] Jag commanded the [[127th Gunship Wing]]. A member of the famed [[CT-5]] batch of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], as well as an able and somewhat aggressive [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], although his destiny was to lead, not fly. However, Jag was later disgraced and demoted after the tragic [[Retreat at Katraasii]]. Luckily for Jag, he was picked up by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]], who drafted Captain Jag as a test pilot for the new [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170 starfighters]]. When [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was issued by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], Captain Jag, in his ARC-170 fighter, along with his squadron of ARC-170 starfighters shot down General Koon's [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class starfighter]] over [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]] during the [[Battle of Cato Neimoidia/Legends|battle]] there, despite his feelings for the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. ==Personality and traits== [[File:Plokoonjsf.png|thumb|right|180px|Jag's ARC-170 cockpit display screens.]] Jag chose to utilize an [[Unidentified script (Star Wars '76)|unidentified script]] to display information on the cockpit display screen of his [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170 starfighter]]. Information was displayed in this script moments before shooting down [[Plo Koon's Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor]]. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Jag}} *{{Film|III}} {{1st}} *[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Cine-Manga|''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith'' Cine-Manga]] *[[Republic 79|''Republic'' 79]] {{Flash}} ==Sources== {{MoreSources}} *[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith Illustrated Screenplay|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith Illustrated Screenplay'']] *{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} {{1stID|Jai'galaar, Jag, and CT 55/11-9009}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' {{Imo}} *{{InsiderCite|87|Order 66: Destroy All Jedi}} {{1stID|CT-55/11-9009}} *''[[Star Wars Fandex Deluxe Edition]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *[[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 35|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 35]] *''[[Star Wars: Mysteries of the Jedi]]'' *{{DB|location|catoneimoidia|Cato Neimoidia}} *{{DB|character|plokoon|Koon, Plo}} *''[[Star Wars: Sith Wars]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Brickipedia|Captain Jag|Captain Jag}} {{Interlang |de=CT-55/11-9009 |es=CT-55/11-9009 |it=Jag |nl=CT-55/11-9009 |pl=CT-55/11-9009 |pt=CT-55/11-9009 }} [[Category:Clone trooper captains]] [[Category:Clone trooper pilots]] [[Category:Imperial Navy pilots of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
